name: tad
description: npm-workspaces monorepo for Tabular data viewer libraries and apps

scripts.build: npm run build -w reltab -w aggtree -w reltab-duckdb -w reltab-bigquery -w reltab-fs && npm run build-prod -w tadviewer && npm run build-prod -w tad-app
scripts.build-dev: npm run build -w reltab -w aggtree -w reltab-duckdb -w reltab-bigquery -w reltab-fs && npm run build-dev -w tadviewer && npm run build-dev -w tad-app
scripts.test: npm run test --if-present -w reltab -w reltab-duckdb -w tadviewer
